title: codereview-pass1 Kconfig heltec WiFi
description: Reviewed heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf WiFi section for ESP_WIFI vs WIFI_NM redundancy with DT node. Found CONFIG_WIFI_ESP32 and NET_L2_WIFI_MGMT. Proposed update to include CONFIG_WIFI_NM=y, CONFIG_ESP_WIFI_ENABLED=y per worker3 and Zephyr espressif HAL. Tagged codereview.
